---
title: "Morning Run at Apple Park"
description: "5+ miles in the early morning at Apple Park, before the flight back to Seattle."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-10-28"
categories: [running, Apple, personal, photo]
image: 01.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![](01.jpg)

![](02.jpg)

![](03.jpg)

![](04.jpg)

![](05.jpg)
:::

Before my flight back to Seattle, I finally found the time to run 5+ miles in the early morning at Apple Park!


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_applepark-keeprunning-activity-6991927269929758720-oAfP).*
